title: PM Lane 168 - Local PM Intake Snapshot Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power snapshot scan burden by grouping the existing Local PM Intake Snapshot cards without changing snapshot content, exports, storage behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Local PM Intake Snapshot into Review Posture, Field Readiness Posture, and Authority Boundary Posture.
Preserved the same six browser-local snapshot cards, labels, detail/evidence text, status pills, summary count, and no-write language.
Kept the snapshot disclosure behavior local and stateless with no snapshot localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to independently confirm the PM Lane 168 grouping shape while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
